author: Claude Code
content:
Documented in wiki:
- New technical page: [Context & Token Budget](/wiki/technical-token-budget) — explains always-loaded vs on-demand, progressive comment loading, index-only lookup, skill description budget, and before/after estimates.
- Decision records added to [Decisions](/wiki/decisions): (1) split CLAUDE.md into terse root + steering page; (2) progressive comment loading.
- Steering page created: [Tracker Workflow (Detailed)](/wiki/steering-tracker-workflow) — holds the full workflow detail that used to live in CLAUDE.md.
